verdict: An exceptionally polished and rhythmically precise chart with fantastic physical flow, minorly held back only by slightly abrupt intro holds.

issues.problem: The 3-beat hold on the BAR lane overlaps with a tap on the NOTE lane at 3.6s, which introduces multi-lane multitasking a bit too early in the warm-up intro for a Standard difficulty chart.
The transition into the first drop features a sudden, untelegraphed jump to continuous eighth-note density. A brief preparatory drum-fill pattern would make this spike feel more natural.
